description:
The "5S"s are based on five principles starting with the letter “S." In Japanese, Seiri (Sort), Seiton (Systematize), Seiso (Shine), Seiketsu (Standardize), and Shitsuke (Sustain). Optimize your processes and develop standardization using the 5S principles.

Toyota is world renowned for its excellence in safe and efficient operations and continuous improvement.  Toyota encourages you to consider applying 5S principles to your workplace today.

Read more. https://www.toyotaforklift.com/resource-library/blog/toyota-solutions/toyota-lean-management-and-5s

chapters.title: WHAT ARE THE POSITIVE RESULTS OF 5S?
PERFORM STEPS THE SAME WAY EVERY TIME
PROVIDE ITEMS NEEDED TO EFFICIENTLY AND SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE THE PROCESS
